findings.evidence: `rg` hits: lines 131-143 contain `rw [posSemidef_kernel_iff]`, `Matrix.posSemidef_vecMulVec_star_self`, then `simpa [dotProduct, Matrix.mulVec, ... mul_left_comm, mul_comm]`; Mathlib has `Matrix.posSemidef_vecMulVec_star_self` at `Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/Matrix/PosDef.lean:418`.
findings.fix: Prove the arbitrary-index matrix directly by rewriting `(Matrix.of fun a b => conj (g a) * g b)` to `Matrix.vecMulVec (star g) g` and applying `Matrix.posSemidef_vecMulVec_star_self`, avoiding the finite-family proof and duplicated normalization.
findings.issue: `posSemidef_kernel_conj_mul` rewrites through `posSemidef_kernel_iff`, proves every finite quadratic form by hand, and repeats the long `dotProduct`/`mulVec`/commutativity `simpa` from line 64; this obscures that the theorem is exactly `Matrix.posSemidef_vecMulVec_star_self`.

summary: One proof takes an avoidable detour through the new iff theorem and repeats fragile quadratic-form normalization instead of using the matrix rank-one PSD lemma directly.
